title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally with a single command-line tool and Docker-like model management.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and asyncio bindings for the Ollama API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; on npm as ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM, embedder and retriever components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured, open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs in Docker.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub-Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + llama.cpp for retrieval and generation.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node for integrating local Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete using Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local LLMs.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for reproducible CI pipelines that spin up Ollama containers for testing.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async HTTP client for the Ollama API with Tokio.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service wrapper that exposes extra endpoints for batching and webhooks over Ollama.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift SDK and sample macOS SwiftUI app for running Ollama models natively on Apple Silicon.
